text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنْ قَوْلِ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ وَ آتُوهُمْ مِنْ مالِ اللَّهِ الَّذِي آتاكُمْ قَالَ الَّذِي أَضْمَرْتَ أَنْ تُكَاتِبَهُ عَلَيْهِ لَا تَقُولُ أُكَاتِبُهُ بِخَمْسَةِ آلَافٍ وَ أَتْرُكُ لَهُ أَلْفاً وَ لَكِنِ انْظُرْ إِلَى الَّذِي أَضْمَرْتَ عَلَيْهِ فَأَعْطِهِ
وَ عَنْ قَوْلِهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فَكاتِبُوهُمْ إِنْ عَلِمْتُمْ فِيهِمْ خَيْراً قَالَ الْخَيْرُ إِنْ عَلِمْتَ أَنَّ عِنْدَهُ مَالًا .

en.hubeali: And by his chain, from Muhammad Bin Muslim,

(It has been narrated) from one of the two (5th or 6th Imamasws), said, ‘I asked himasws about the Words of Allahazwj Mighty and Majestic [24:33] and give them of the wealth of Allah which He has Given you. Heasws said: ‘The woman who thinks that she would be contracted upon him should not be saying, ‘I will contract him with five thousand, and I would leave for him a thousand’, but consider to that which she is concealing upon him, so give it’.
And about the Words of the Mighty and Majestic [24:33] give them the writing if you know any good in them, heasws said: ‘If you know that in it is wealth (profit)’.
